data.body:
Goal:
Add the overview UI surface for stale beat grooming. The overview header/tab row should expose a right-side stale beat rail that lists non-terminal beats older than 7 days and lets the user select which stale beats to review.

Verification:
1. Run focused component/lib tests for stale beat age filtering and overview rendering.
2. Open the overview screen and confirm stale beats appear in the right-side rail without disrupting the state matrix.

Constraints:
Use existing overview components, tab styling, and beat detail opening behavior. Do not add a new top-level page.
data.title: Add stale grooming overview rail
